Levels.feedback: Feedback is displayed based on the participant's response
Levels.scene: A scene image is displayed and the participant predicts if it is associated with a reward or neutral outcome

reward_condition.Description: The correct outcome associated with this scene

Levels.neutral: This trial's scene is associated with a neutral outcome
Levels.reward: This trial's scene is associated with a reward outcome

Levels.nonviolation: The scene displayed belongs to a nonviolation condition pairmate
Levels.violation: The scene displayed belongs to a violation condition pairmate

pairmate.Description: A or B item within a pairmate

Levels.A: First item in a pairmate; only A scenes shown during reward task runs

response_accuracy.Description: A participant's response is scored for accuracy. If no response was made, the value is NaN

response_time.Description: Reaction time. Time in seconds for participant to make a response since stimulus onset

repetition.Description: This trial is the nth time this image was shown within the reward prediction phase

pairID.Description: Pairmate number assigned to the A-B pairing for this participant
